steps.screen: This is the main Hacker News homepage displaying a ranked list of technology news stories and discussions
steps.action: Tap on the 'new' tab to navigate to the newest stories page
steps.goal: Explore the New stories page (priority=0.8) to understand different story browsing views and confirm browse_stories capability variations

steps.screen: This screen displays the newest stories on Hacker News, showing a chronological list of recently submitted technology news and discussion items
steps.action: Tap on the first story item to navigate to its detail and comments page
steps.goal: Explore the Story detail/comments page (priority 0.9) to understand how users view individual stories and participate in discussions

steps.screen: This screen displays a detailed view of a Hacker News story about AI ethics, showing the full story content and providing a comment form for user discussion
steps.action: Tap on the 'ask' tab to navigate to the Ask HN section
steps.goal: Explore the Ask HN page (priority 0.8) to confirm the browse_ask_hn capability and understand this differentiating feature

steps.screen: This screen displays the Ask HN section of Hacker News, showing a list of user-submitted questions and discussion topics
steps.action: Tap on the 'show' tab to navigate to the Show HN section
steps.goal: Show HN page (priority=0.8) - exploring the browse_show_hn capability which is a key differentiator of Hacker News

steps.screen: This screen displays the Show HN section of Hacker News, showing a list of user-submitted projects and creations for community feedback
steps.action: Tap on the 'jobs' tab to navigate to the jobs section
steps.goal: Jobs page (priority=0.7) - exploring the job posting and browsing capabilities

steps.screen: This screen displays a list of job openings at Y Combinator startups for users to browse and apply to
steps.action: Tap on the 'past' tab to navigate to the past stories section
steps.goal: Explore the Past stories archive from the frontier to confirm browse_past_stories capability

steps.screen: This screen displays a chronological list of Hacker News stories from April 5, 2026, allowing users to browse past content by date
steps.action: Tap on the 'comments' tab to navigate to the comments section
steps.goal: Explore the Recent comments page from the frontier and confirm the browse_recent_comments capability

steps.screen: This screen displays a threaded comment discussion view showing individual comments and replies from Hacker News stories
steps.action: Tap on the 'submit' tab to navigate to the story submission form
steps.goal: Explore the Submit story page (priority=0.7) from the exploration frontier

steps.screen: This is a login/registration screen that blocks access to story submission, requiring users to authenticate before they can submit content
steps.action: Click on the 'Forgot your password?' link to navigate to password recovery
steps.goal: Explore the password recovery page frontier item and confirm the password_recovery capability

steps.screen: This is a password reset screen where users can enter their username to receive a password reset email
